programme.title: Cinta Kita Makin Dramatis, Makin Romantis

When he confesses his feelings, Jihan challenges him: 'Is it love or just admiration?' Things take a dark turn when a village girl obsessed with Supri frames him for a scandal. Furious, Jihan and her team demand that Supri be kicked off the production. How will Supri clear his name?

programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 97
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Warteg Bintang Lima Tapi Kamu Yang Utama
programme.desc: Babe Ali’s daughter (Ersya Aurelia) runs a small warteg (local food stall) business offering a cheap promotion: three side dishes with rice for only Rp20,000. She often clashes with a wealthy "mama’s boy" (Kevin Hillers) who mocks her tomboyish nature and her overenthusiastic way of running the business. However, their frequent arguments turn into mutual affection, even though her father warns her to stay away from him.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 149
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Dihadapan Ikan Semua Cintamu Menyala Abangkuh
programme.desc: Beautiful Gina’s world is turned upside down when debt collectors suddenly harass her. To make matters worse, her mother disappears, unable to settle their debts. In a desperate move, Gina seeks refuge with her grandfather and starts working at his fish business. There, she crosses paths with Bagas, an annoying guy who won't stop mocking her hard work. Can Gina survive the fish market and Bagas’s constant teasing?

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 603
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Jodohku Itu Kamu Lewat Jalur Langit
programme.desc: Ben’s grandfather states in his will that Ben and Kevin must get married soon to inherit the fortune and become CEO. Ben tries to fulfill the requirement despite not having a girlfriend and must compete with Kevin.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 98
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: IJININ BUKALAPAK DI HATIMU DONG
programme.desc: Onil, who was about to meet with a client, was caught by the public order police (Satpol PP) because Vita and her friends' merchandise was in his car. Onil, who learned that the merchandise belonged to Vita and her friends, was very upset. But Vita and her friends never gave up selling on the sidewalk even though they were always chased by the Satpol PP.

programme.title: Jodoh Ditukar Sungguh Di Luar Nalar
programme.desc: Kevin (Kevin Hillers) is a man who despises arranged marriages. However, he's secretly curious about Dewi, the woman his mother chose for him. Meanwhile, Dewi, who already has a boyfriend, convinces Luna (Yunita Siregar) to impersonate her and work at Kevin's company. Kevin quickly realizes the deception but decides to play along. As he grows closer to Luna, he actually agrees to the marriage only for things to get complicated when the truth about her identity finally surfaces.

programme.title: KATANYA MENDUKUNG, GATAU NYA MALAH NIKUNG
programme.desc: Alex (22) and Rendy (23) have been inseparable best friends since childhood. Despite growing up in the same neighborhood, their lives are worlds apart; Alex comes from a wealthy family, while Rendy has been an orphan living alone since he was eight. Having raised himself to be independent, Rendy is treated like a second son by Alex's parents. For Alex, Rendy isn't just a best friend-he's the older brother he never had

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 150
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cinta Kita Makin Dramatis, Makin Romantis
programme.desc: Supri’s quiet village becomes a film set, and thanks to his martial arts skills, he’s cast as an actor. He soon falls for the leading lady, Jihan. When he confesses his feelings, Jihan challenges him: 'Is it love or just admiration?' Things take a dark turn when a village girl obsessed with Supri frames him for a scandal. Furious, Jihan and her team demand that Supri be kicked off the production. How will Supri clear his name?

programme.title: INCES JUNJUNGAN KITA SEMUA
programme.desc: Inces is a beautiful yet tough and rebellious tomboy who extorts change from drivers at a busy intersection. One day, she targets Romi during a heated argument with his girlfriend, faking a serious injury for 'hush money.' Romi sees through her act but ends up taking her to the hospital anyway. Their paths cross again when Inces is hired to care for Romi’s mother. Little do they know, they share a deeper bond: both were raised as adopted children.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 151
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Senin Berubah Jadi Minggu Setelah Bucin Mencintaimu
programme.desc: A heated scuffle over a bowl of ketoprak leads to an accidental phone swap between Aldi and Siti. Meanwhile, Siti’s life as an online bike taxi driver hits rock bottom after receiving too many bad ratings. Forced to find a new job, she becomes a Personal Assistant only to discover that her new boss is the very man she fought with over lunch.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 605
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal 30 minit yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan.

programme.title: Healing With Zizan - EP 4
programme.desc: Dua selebriti lelaki tanahair yang akan ditemu bual oleh Zizan tentang Hijrah mereka, berkongsi pandangan dan perjalanan rohani mereka tentang apa yang mendorong mereka untuk maju ke hadapan

programme.title: Ex Aku Pontianak - EP 3
programme.desc: Kantoi jumpa wanita lain, Malik ditinggalkan Bella yang rupanya adalah pontianak. Malik mula diganggu lalu minta bantuan Suraya, pemburu pontianak untuk tangkap Bella dan juga zombie suruhannya!

programme.title: Impiana S3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Impiana musim ke-3 ini berkonsepkan tentang "Dekorasi Homestay Impiana" menampilkan dua buah rumah yang memberi inspirasi kepada penonton dan dihoskan oleh Fiza Frizzy.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 23
programme.desc: Hajar lega apabila mendapat tahu ada orang menolong Herni dan Qistina. Herni memarahi Qistina kerana perkenalan Qistina dengan Luqman telah membawa kesedihan dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola - EP 39
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Tersuka Tanpa Sengaja - EP 12
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Syed Arif dan Farhah tanpa bersulam cinta mengundang pelbagai konflik. Ketika hubungan mula serasi, Syed Arif bertemu semula dengan kekasih lamanya, Katrina yang rupanya adik kepada Farhah.

programme.title: Pengantin Lelaki Untuk Cik Gadis - EP 10
programme.desc: Pertemuan Kris dan Salsa bermula ketika Kris membawa diri pulang ke kampung Tok Abah. Salsa kini menghadapi tuduhan pecah amanah.

programme.title: Ratu Ten Pin 2: Shalin - EP 2
programme.desc: Adaptasi kisah suka duka pemain bowling kebangsaan iaitu Shalin Zulkifli mengejar gelaran pemain nombor satu Malaysia dan antarabangsa sehingga digelarkan Ratu Ten Pin.

programme.title: Jangan Ambil Padang Kami - EP 3
programme.desc: Pelbagai konflik dan cabaran hidup dilalui tujuh sekawan ini dalam menyelamatkan padang mereka daripada dijadikan kawasan pembangunan.

programme.title: Holla Dolla
programme.desc: Dolla dan rakan artis generasi kini berdepan cabaran untuk mempersembahkan lagu popular dari ikon industri muzik tanah air: Amy Mastura, Ramlah Ram dan Jeffrydin.

programme.title: Ahli Bapak Bapak Club - EP 11
programme.desc: Mengisahkan 3 sahabat baik, Joe, Bob dan Nick dalam mengharungi kehidupan mereka yang penuh dugaan dan pancaroba selaku lelaki, suami dan bapa.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 3
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Harta Dalam Stor S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Kembali menerjah stor kediaman selebriti! Ikuti hos, Zoey Rahman dan Fad Bocey untuk mencari barang-barang milik selebriti tanah air yang boleh diguna pakai dan dijual.

programme.title: 3 Campur 2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Kisah sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai lima adik beradik tiri. Ayahnya mempunyai tiga orang anak dan isteri baru mempunyai dua orang anak yang nakal. Timbul pelbagai konflik dan komedi dalam cerita ini.

programme.title: Kebun Urban - EP 1
programme.desc: Razif akan menemuramah serta mencungkil rahsia petani-petani kecilan di Malaysia yang menanam sayuran dihalaman rumah mereka. Razif dan Sherson Lian akan memasak resipi ringkas menggunakan tanaman mereka.

programme.title: Raya Raya Raya! - EP 2
programme.desc: Program bual bicara komedi yang penuh santai memaparkan penglibatan barisan selebriti dan para penonton dalam segmen-segmen yang pasti mencuit hati.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 23
programme.desc: Hajar lega apabila mendapat tahu ada orang menolong Herni dan Qistina. Herni memarahi Qistina kerana perkenalan Qistina dengan Luqman telah membawa kesedihan dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Framed - EP 7
programme.desc: Dalang konspirasi melawan balik, kali ini mengancam bukan sahaja Lia tetapi keluarganya juga. Tetapi semasa terperangkap dengan bahaya yang menjulang, sekutu rahsia kini muncul.

programme.title: Lara Ati - EP 4

programme.title: JMT - EP 3

programme.title: Seri Ferry Mart - EP 4

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 24

programme.title: Mr London Ms Langkawi - EP 3

programme.title: Go Goa Gone
programme.desc: Friends seeking thrill at a Goa rave reach a deserted island, only to face a terrifying zombie outbreak that turns their party into a desperate fight to stay alive. Release Year: 2013 Director: Raj and D.K. Awards: 2013 Winner ASIN Award- Best Cinematographer- Dan Macarthur

programme.title: Table No. 21
programme.desc: A couple is thrilled to participate in a game show with a huge cash prize, until they find out that the questions ironically tie back to an important chapter of their lives and that the only way to survive is to complete the game. Release Year: 2013 Director: Aditya Datt Awards: 2 nominations

programme.title: Pukar
programme.desc: Unaware of his best friend Anjali's feeling Major Jaidev fall for Pooja. Release Year: 2000 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: 2001 Nominee Filmfare AwardBest ActorAnil Kapoor

programme.title: Badhaai Ho Badhaai
programme.desc: Anjali and Steven fall in love and elope. This brings an end to the friendship between the two families. Release Year: 2002 Director: Satish Kaushik

programme.title: Shaadi Se Pehle
programme.desc: Ashish is head over heels for Rani, but her parents aren't having it because he's unemployed. Everything changes when he lands a job, winning their approval at last! Release Year: 2006 Director: Satish Kaushik

programme.title: Company
programme.desc: Chandu and Mallik team up to form a gang that quickly earns a reputation. But as egos clash and trust fades, tension builds, leading to betrayal and the gang's downfall. Release Year: 2002 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: Gopi Kishan
programme.desc: A criminal uses an inept look-alike cop in a revenge scheme. Release Year: 1994 Director: Mukesh Duggal

programme.title: Time Story
programme.desc: A scientist invents a time-travelling gadget, leading to a battle between his son and his own evil twin brother.

programme.title: Article 15
programme.desc: In rural India, an honest police officer takes on brutal caste crimes, risking his life and career as he challenges corruption, violence, and deep-rooted injustice. Release Year: 2019 Director: Anubhav Sinha Awards: Best Director Critics- Anubhav Sinha, Best Actor Critics- Ayushmann Khurrana

programme.title: Ek Aur Ek Gyarah
programme.desc: Two small-time thieves are forced into kidnapping a child to save someone they love, facing fear, guilt, and a desperate race to find a way out without harming anyone. Release Year: 2003 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Company
programme.desc: Chandu and Mallik team up to form a gang that quickly earns a reputation. But as egos clash and trust fades, tension builds, leading to betrayal and the gang's downfall. Release Year: 2002 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: Gopi Kishan
programme.desc: A criminal uses an inept look-alike cop in a revenge scheme. Release Year: 1994 Director: Mukesh Duggal

programme.title: Time Story
programme.desc: A scientist invents a time-travelling gadget, leading to a battle between his son and his own evil twin brother.

programme.title: Dil Juunglee
programme.desc: The movie is a romantic comedy that displays the ups and downs in Sumit and Karol's relationship. Release Year: 2018 Director: Aleya Sen

programme.title: Cheeni Kum
programme.desc: Buddhadev Gupta Amitabh Bachchan, a 64-year-old chef in London, falls in love with Nina Verma Tabu, a woman 30 years his junior. Their unconventional romance faces societal challenges, especially from Nina's father, who is six years younger than Buddhadev. Release Year: 2007 Director: R. Balki Awards: Filmfare Awards- Best Actor Female Critics - Tabu

programme.title: Jodi No.1
programme.desc: Partners in crime Jai and Veeru set their next target on a rich businessman, Rai Bahadur. Things turn hilarious when both of them fall for his daughters. Release Year: 2001 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Shaadi Se Pehle
programme.desc: Ashish is head over heels for Rani, but her parents aren't having it because he's unemployed. Everything changes when he lands a job, winning their approval at last! Release Year: 2006 Director: Satish Kaushik

programme.title: Hit- The First Case
programme.desc: A brilliant but troubled police inspector sets out to solve a confounding case, all while fighting to gain clarity into his troubled past.

programme.title: Dange
programme.desc: Former friends Xavier and Yuva meet again in college as adversaries when their respective cohorts come to blows during their annual cultural festival.

programme.title: Marjaavan
programme.desc: Young couple Raghu and Zoya enjoy their lives together until a vertically challenged gang leader with harmful intentions turns their world upside down.

programme.title: Arjun Patiala
programme.desc: Arjun Patiala is a quirky small-town cop, who is fond of women and even more fond of his drinks. His original and unusual ideas help reduce crime rate in the town.

programme.title: Time To Dance
programme.desc: When a ballroom dancer's shot at a crucial tournament is jeopardized, a street dancer must face his own painful past and step up as her new partner.

programme.title: Dil Hai Ke Manta Nahi
programme.desc: Pooja runs away from home to be with her boyfriend. On her way, she meets Raghu, who agrees to escort her to her destination, and falls in love with him.

programme.title: Bade Miyan Chote Miyan
programme.desc: When a masked madman who wants to destroy India steals a dangerous weapon, two elite soldiers must work together to recover it.

programme.title: Gumraah
programme.desc: The murder investigation into a young man's death takes an unexpected turn when the cops discover that the prime suspect has a lookalike.

programme.title: Tara Vs Bilal
programme.desc: Bilal, a carefree man, lives an easy-going life in London and falls in love with Tara, a sensitive woman, but is unable to express his feelings to her.

programme.title: Anek
programme.desc: Madhu, an animator, gets thoughts about her past life, but her psychiatrist believes it to be a figment of her imagination. Madhu happens to meet Ashwin, the man she was in love with in her past life.

programme.title: Vicky Vidya Ka Woh Wala Video
programme.desc: A newly married couple's relationship and reputation are put at risk when their CD is stolen. The story follows their roller coaster journey to recover the CD.

programme.title: Param Sundari
programme.desc: Two hearts collide as a North and South Indian unexpectedly fall for each other. Their diverse backgrounds ignite a comedic and tumultuous love story, brimming with cultural misadventures.

programme.title: Tuesdays & Fridays
programme.desc: Two millennials get into a relationship where they are allowed to meet only on 'Tuesdays , Fridays'.

programme.title: Aankh Micholi
programme.desc: Three cousins, Laadli Chibber, Bajrang Das Khatri and Shikhar Randhawa, embrace the warmth of a new city when they move to Mumbai, but they also face challenges that transform their lives.

programme.title: Costao
programme.desc: In the 1990s, customs officer Costao Fernandes becomes a legend in Goa due to his bravery and tactics. His personal and professional life unravels when he kills a powerful drug lord in self-defence.

programme.title: Namastey London
programme.desc: On a trip to India, Jasmeet's father forcefully marries her off to Arjun. However, when they return to London, Jasmeet announces her intention of marrying her boyfriend, Charlie Brown.

programme.desc: Young couple Raghu and Zoya enjoy their lives together until a vertically challenged gang leader with harmful intentions turns their world upside down.

programme.title: It's Showtime

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15
programme.desc: This comical spin-off of the 80s comedy programme Goin' Bananas is currently the Philippines' most successful children's comedy show, created and directed by one of Goin' Bananas' original stars, Bobot Mortiz.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: The life of a simple flower farm girl is shattered when she falls for a charming accountant, who turns out to be a married gun cartel member. Targeted for his stolen money, she loses everything she holds dear and reinvents herself to seek justice.

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The lives of four individuals are turned upside down after they witness the murder of their friend. They band together to put the alleged killer behind bars, but years later, the imprisoned man seeks revenge, unraveling dark secrets that test their loyalty and survival.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Ngayon at Kailanman
programme.desc: Eva fights to reclaim her place in the wealthy Cortes family while searching for the truth about her identity. Fate brings her together with Inno, and their love story endures family secrets, rivalry and tragedy as they discover the real meaning of forgiveness and redemption.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: Being a prominent political clan, the Sagrados want nothing but to keep their name faultless and sacred, until a controversial incident comes their way.

programme.title: TV Patrol Global Edition
programme.desc: Comprehensive and incisive, TV Patrol is the benchmark in Philippines news journalism, bringing you the most relevant news delivered by the country's best news anchors.

programme.title: El Brujo
programme.desc: A young man raised in the mystical community in Banahaw seeks justice for the death of his father. He enters a world of vigilantes fighting a notorious druglord, who happens to be behind his father's death.

programme.title: Movie - Thagappansamy
programme.desc: To solve the drought issue in his village, Kathirvel hires Shanmugham, an expert, to dig a well. However, things take a turn for the worse when Shanmugham dies.

programme.title: Movie - Neram Nallarukku
programme.desc: Ramarajan, a doctor by profession, falls in love with a woman named Jyothi. She reciprocates his feelings but is held back by her evil uncle who tries to create a rift in their relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Yogam Raja Yogam
programme.desc: When an unemployed Siva meets Usha, a spoilt brat, the two instantly clash with each other. Their relationship changes when Siva rescues her from a difficult situation.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Rasikkum Seemanae
programme.desc: A shrewd businessman uses several tricks to outdo his competitors, and even uses blackmail to get his way. He has to face the consequences when he resorts to blackmailing his own girlfriend.

programme.title: Movie - Manaivikku Mariyathai
programme.desc: Priya decides to work after her husband loses his job, despite his initial reluctance. Trouble ensues when Priya's employer falls in love with her and forces her to marry him.

programme.title: Movie - Vidhi
programme.desc: When Radha falls in love with Raja, a rich lawyer's son, and ends up pregnant, Raja and his father refuse to acknowledge paternity. She decides to take the matter to court to seek justice.

programme.title: Movie - Kovai Brothers
programme.desc: Friends Ganesh and Vasanth come to Chennai to find the killers of Ganesh's sister and seek revenge. They take up a job at a television channel to accomplish their mission.

programme.title: Movie - Ejamaan
programme.desc: Vaanavaryan, the much-loved leader of a village, invites his rival Vallavarayan's wrath when he marries Vaitheeswari, the woman he loves. To take revenge, Vallavarayan resorts to drastic measures.

programme.title: Movie - Kakkai Siraginile
programme.desc: An orphan who is brought up by a Brahmin couple is very affectionate towards their daughter. However, the young man and the girl face problems when the villagers misunderstand their relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Mamiyar Veedu
programme.desc: Aravind and Parthasarathy become friends in jail and continue to follow the path of crime after their release. When Aravind decides to change his lifestyle, his friend refuses to mend his ways.

programme.title: Movie - Kizhakku Veethi
programme.desc: Vedavalli is the rich and powerful landlord of the village. After a few altercations between her daughter and Ponnurasu, a villager, Vedavalli swears to ruin Ponnurasu's family.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Attakathi
programme.desc: Dinakaran becomes a gang leader while at university but when he falls in love with Poornima and decides to elope with her, she confesses she has already gone against her family's wishes to marry another man.

programme.title: Movie - Kanden Kadhalai
programme.desc: Sakthivel and Anjali are poles apart in attitude. Circumstances bring them together and Anjali's parents believe they are in love. But they soon part ways after Anjali elopes to meet her lover.

programme.title: Movie - Giri
programme.desc: Two feuding landlords struggle to destroy each other. When one of them loses his son, he vows to kill the son of his rival. The boy, however, manages to escape only to return 20 years later.

programme.title: Movie - Strawberry
programme.desc: Milovina, a student, informs Saravanan, a taxi driver, that a ghost wants to communicate with him. The ghost, Anu, requests Saravanan to take revenge on the people responsible for her death.

programme.title: Movie - Ayogya
programme.desc: Karnan is a corrupt police inspector who frequently bends the rules to suit his own needs. However, he realigns his morals and tries to do the right thing after a life-changing event.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2020/2021 (MNC)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 44
programme.desc: With exclusive behind-the-scenes access, PL Stories spends time with Yakubu Aiyegbeni at Finchley Boxing Club, where he is forging a new path in the next chapter of his sporting life. We explore his growing passion for boxing and the discipline it demands, offering a fresh perspective on life after football. Alongside this new pursuit, Yakubu reflects on his remarkable journey from his early years in Nigeria to becoming one of the Premier League's most prolific and respected strikers.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 17
programme.desc: A tale of two seasons - Gary Cahill recalls the Chelsea championship campaigns of 2014/15 under Jose Mourinho, and 2016/17 with Antonio Conte at the helm.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 8
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 33
programme.desc: We look back at all the very best moments of the 2025/2026 season so far. An action-packed show filled with exciting Premier League programming and digital content.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 43
programme.desc: We join Willian in Gremio, Brazil, where he is currently continuing his playing career, as he reflects on an incredible journey in the Premier League. Sharing insights from his time at Chelsea and that controversial move across London to Arsenal and then Fulham, Willian opens up about the highs, challenges and defining moments that shaped his career at the top level of English football.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 33
programme.desc: With 87 goals to his name Danny Welbeck is the fifth-highest goalscorer among active Premier League players, and across a career spanning 17 seasons he has seen it all. This week, the Brighton striker sits down with former teammate Owen Hargreaves to reflect on his remarkable journey. From his early days at Manchester United and being crowned champion in 2013, to his move to Arsenal where he overcame adversity, and now to his current role thriving as a leader for the Seagulls.

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 20 JAN
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 22, kicking off with the Manchester derby, we then turn to Chelsea against Brentford, before Monday night's finale as Brighton face Bournemouth.

programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 23, starting with Saturday's early kick off with West Ham hosting Sunderland, Forest travel to Brentford, and finally Monday's game at Hill Dickinson Stadium, as Everton take on Leeds.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2016/2017 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 37
programme.desc: Andoni Iraola went from relative obscurity to leading a once relegation-threatened club to its highest ever points tally in the Premier League. We explore how his fearless philosophy, tactical innovation and emotional connection to the game have driven his teams to challenge expectations and rewrite their identity. A story of a Basque footballing icon, and his remarkable journey from Cyprus to the Premier League with Bournemouth in 5 years.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 44

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 16
programme.desc: Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink was one of the most prolific strikers English football has ever seen. The two time Golden Boot winner looks back on his time at Leeds United and Chelsea, revisiting his greatest goals and most memorable matches.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 7
programme.desc: Over a nine season spell in the Premier League, Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink etched his name into footballing folklore as one of the most dynamic goalscorers in the competition's history. Fourth all time in Premier League goals for Chelsea, Hasselbaink's iconic freekicks and powerful finishes have seen him score some of the League's most memorable goals.

programme.desc: We look back at all the very best moments of the 2025/2026 season so far. An action-packed show filled with exciting Premier League programming and digital content.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 44
programme.desc: With exclusive behind-the-scenes access, PL Stories spends time with Yakubu Aiyegbeni at Finchley Boxing Club, where he is forging a new path in the next chapter of his sporting life. We explore his growing passion for boxing and the discipline it demands, offering a fresh perspective on life after football. Alongside this new pursuit, Yakubu reflects on his remarkable journey from his early years in Nigeria to becoming one of the Premier League's most prolific and respected strikers.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 5
programme.desc: We peel back the layers on the Premier League's most iconic managerial rivalries; battles that shaped eras, defined clubs, and captivated fans around the world. From the fierce mind games between Arsene Wenger and Sir Alex Ferguson, to the emotional explosion of Kevin Keegan's title-chasing Newcastle. From the simmering tension and touchline clashes of Mourinho vs. Wenger, to the tactical chess match between Jurgen Klopp and Pep Guardiola.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 7
programme.desc: Widely regarded as the two best managers in Premier League history, Sir Alex Ferguson and Arsene Wenger went toe to toe on the touchline on numerous occasions over the years. But what made their rivalry so fierce? We take a look at the intense clashes, memorable moments on and off the pitch and the monumental impact their duels had on English football's modern era.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2017/2018 season.

programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 23, starting with Saturday's early kick off with West Ham hosting Sunderland, Forest travel to Brentford, and finally Monday's game at Hill Dickinson Stadium, as Everton take on Leeds.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 8
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.desc: Andoni Iraola went from relative obscurity to leading a once relegation-threatened club to its highest ever points tally in the Premier League. A story of a Basque footballing icon, and his remarkable journey from Cyprus to the Premier League with Bournemouth in 5 years.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Garreth McLellan vs. Dricus Du Plessis
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts in South Africa including two fighters duke it out for the EFC Worldwide Middleweight Championship in Garreth "Soldier Boy" McLellan vs. Dricus "Stillknocks" Du Plessis. Bonus coverage includes Texier Kabesa vs. Luke Michael from Durban, South Africa.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former champions Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (38-1, 27 KOs) and 'El Asesino' Kermit Cintron (32-2, 28 KOs) in a middleweight battle. The fight took place at the Home Depot Center in Carson, California, USA, on May 8, 2010.

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Sergio Martinez vs. Darren Barker
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a middleweight title fight between champion Sergio Martinez and up-and-coming European middleweight Darren Baker that ends with a right hook blast. Also on the card, action from 5-time champion Timothy Bradley.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Takakeisho, Hakuho, Hokutofuji and Tamawashi from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 8: Rio de Janeiro, Brazil - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu and the Martial Art of Grappling with Masters Renato Barreto and Breno Sivak.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Victor Ortiz
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features The Ring Magazine's 2011 Fight of The Year from the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA. Undefeated welterweight world champion Andre Berto (27-0, 21 KOs) puts his title on the line against 'Vicious' Victor Ortiz (28-2, 22 KOs) in a fight that restores your passion in the sport of boxing.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Timothy Bradley vs. Luis Carlos Abregu
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a bout between 2 undefeated fighters, Timothy 'Desert Storm' Bradley (25-0, 11 KOs) vs. Luis Carlos Abregu, aka 'El Potro' (29-0, 23 KOs) from the Agua Caliente Casino, Rancho Mirage in California, USA on July 17, 2010.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Venice Qualifier tackle the Venice Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Rumbling Dice, Clear Climb and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Ryan Rhodes
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Saul (Canelo) Alvarez making his first defense of the WBC light middleweight title, taking on challenger Ryan Rhodes. The bout ends in the final round after a series of unanswered blows. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.desc: This episode follows former UFC welterweight champion Matt Serra around his hometown in New Jersey for a look at the lighter side of this intense competitor. programme.desc: Featuring Boy's CMX Form and Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney World, Orlando, FL.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode follows former UFC welterweight champion Matt Serra around his hometown in New Jersey for a look at the lighter side of this intense competitor. Ring girl Natasha Wicks shows us that the fighters aren't the only ones with the big guns. Plus a behind the scenes look at the UFC Fan Expo and an interview with MMA legend Chael Sonnen.

programme.title: FS MMA
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features all of the highlights from BodogFIGHT season one showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Andre Ward vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features light heavyweights Andre 'S.O.G.' Ward (25-0, 13 KOs) vs. Chad Dawson (31-1, 17 KOs) in a championship contest from the Oracle Arena in Oakland, California, USA, on September 8, 2012. A paid attendance of 7,611 brought in a gate of $706,469 and 1.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about how the use of motion animation technology can help martial artists learn more efficient ways to put extra power behind their punches and kicks.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Dmitry Priog vs. Daniel Jacobs
programme.desc: This episode features a middleweight battle between Dmitry Priog and Daniel Jacobs that ends in a crushing overhand right, as well as kickboxing, sumo, weapons and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing Ricardo Mayorga in a light middleweight title fight, the first of two bouts between the two, that features an exciting last-minute finish. Also on the card, action from former champs Juan Manuel Marquez and Juan Diaz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Kotoyuki, Asanoyama, Aoiyama and Ryuden from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Rusty Derouen
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector 'Macho' Camacho (46-3-0, 20 KO) battles Rusty Derouen (33-6-0, 25 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from Erie, Pennsylvania, USA.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 215

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free S1 - EP 21

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 9

Nasty Crocodile promised to take him to dry land…. But only in exchange for one thing…. His HEART! Monkey tricked Crocodile and when Crocodile found out that Monkey swapped his heart for a measley mango, he chased Monkey up a tree.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Tickbird didn't sit on Hippo's back, infact they weren't friends at all! Tickbird was sick of Hippo splashing all the time. Tickbird outwits Hippo by using the tides and from that day she is allowed to sit on Hippo's back and pick off all the yummy ticks she can eat! Tales from Africa.

When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: When Mom is sick on a busy day at home, Tag offers to pick up the slack and take on her tasks for the day. Tag handles it at first, but when the responsibilities start to stack up, she realizes that being Mom is much harder than she thought. \ Tag and Scooch are excited to get to know Kit, who has organized a bunch of cat-ivities for the day. But when Kit realizes she accidentally scratched up Frank and Beans’s tree, she, Tag and Scooch find a way to make it up to them.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: When Tag is frustrated living in a crowded house, and Scooch is bored in a quiet house, the two friends switch houses for the day. At first they both love their new lives. But as Scooch gets overwhelmed by all the activity at The Barker house, and Tag gets bored by the quiet life at the Pooch’s, they eagerly switch back before the day is done. \ When the Pawston Get Sox go on a losing streak, Tag and Scooch come up with the idea to have a team mascot.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: When the Dews' Glitter Guide, Willow comes to check on the Dews’ progress, they feel like they’re failing to impress her, until Lola gets locked out of the apartment during a game of Hide-and-Seek and Dews work together to get her back inside. / When the Dew Drops discover a time capsule in the park, they set out to find the mystery owner.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: When Phoebe convinces the Tooth Fairy to visit before Marcus has actually lost his tooth, the Dew Drops do everything in their power to make sure the tooth is out before she arrives! / The Dews decide to hold a concert in the park for their animal friends, but can’t find the time to practice.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 4

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 22

For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: The dollhouse is immersed in imaginative Wild West play with Sheriff Gabby, Sheriff Pandy, and CatRat the Bandit. programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 47
programme.desc: When Eep and the others try to intervene with Thunk and Blurg's first date, they decide to run away so they can live happily ever after; Snoot and Ugga race each other to get to the Doomsday Skunkguin but are forced to put their differences aside once the weirder animals come out to hunt them down

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 48
programme.desc: When Eep is kicked out of Thunk's new imaginary role-playing adventure game she decides to play her own, real version of the game; Fed up with Squawk's mean teaching style, Eep has Grug fire him and replace him with Rad, the quintessential young, cool teacher

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 53
programme.desc: After a baby says a swear word on live television (censored by child-friendly online filter Sheriff Potty Pardner), Boss becomes obsessed with proving that the baby was taught this filth by their new arch-nemesis, Lumpy the Park Duck. programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 54
programme.desc: After Boss insults Tina's imaginary friend, he's forced into "Imaginary Friend Sensitivity Training" at Baby Corp. programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: When Ruffnut is captured by Dragon Hunters, it's up to Astrid and Tuffnut to defend Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: Unaware of the war on Dragon's Edge, Hiccup, Snotlout and Johann discover an island full of dragons that have been wounded by the Dragon Hunters

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 21

To prove her wrong, the boys decide to actually create the villain in the comic and then have Captain Underpants save the day. Unfortunately, Krupp - and therefore Captain Underpants - is away at a principals' convention.There's no one to save them...until a real life Plungerina saves tthe day! But who is really Plungerina?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 22

But no one's having any fun! George and Harold want to right this wrong with pranks and comics. But Krupp enlists Mr. Neamer (bizarro Meaner), who then super-enlargers his brain and becomes Brainy Blabulous, in order to stop the subversion of authority.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 20

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 65

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 66

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

But the Monkeys, Frog, Hippo and the Bees all set off in different directions - North, South, East and West - and Spider's thread soon runs out.

programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded - is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: When Tag worries that she's no longer a "Go" dog, Lady Lydia helps her find a new persona by helping Tag try on a bunch of different hats. Luckily, when a runaway puppy needs to be wrangled, and only the speedy Tag can catch him, Tag realizes she was a Go dog all along. \ Sergeant Pooch reads Scooch, Tag and Kit a story book during their sleepover. But when the last pages are missing, the three kids work together to make up their own ending to the story.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Tag, Scooch and Kit think they found the perfect story for their newspaper: Bigpaw is in Pawston! Tag struggles to take orders as first mate while helping Scooch navigate maritime obstacles and avoid the fearsome pirates.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: When Marcus loses an invitation to a birthday party and doesn’t know where it will take place, the Dew Drops set out to find the location and get Marcus to the party on time. / When Harper can’t sleep because of a strange noise in her room, the Dews must figure out the source.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: While helping Lola pack for her first day of camp, the Dews get stuck inside her backpack! programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: When Donna decides to show off her not-so-flashy skills as a magician at the Community Center talent show, the Zenkos must do everything they can to save her act from becoming an embarrassing disaster. / After Sam’s favorite skateboard accidentally gets put in with donations Mr. Tanaka is collecting for a fundraiser, the team is led on a merry chase as the skateboard passes from one Harmony Harbor denizen to another.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Little Lula has set up a lemonade stand, but she’s not getting any business. The Zenkos swing into action to send customers her way. / When Donna, Fawna and Rona have a spat, the triplets’ longstanding annual tradition of viewing a comet together is in jeopardy. Now it’s up to Team Zenko to get the three feuding sisters back together again before the comet streaks by.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Gabby brings DJ Catnip a microphone for him to use in the big music show, but he has some terrible news: he lost his groove! Determined to help him get his groove back, Gabby and Pandy take him on a musical search through the dollhouse. As they go, Gabby uses the microphone to record sounds from the Gabby Cats’ everyday activities that culminate into a new song that gets DJ his groove back just in time for the show! In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, Gabby sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a recipe for dandelion soup and a soup bowl, she discovers Kitty Fairy is sick! Gabby and Pandy make her some delicious dandelion soup and while she rests, they take care of her Garden. With the help of all the Gabby Cats, they water the Singing Flowers, help the Rainbow Kitty Bushes regain their color, and sing some fussy Itty Bitty Blossoms a lullaby. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song!

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 51
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.desc: Emily goes inside Stargate, an historic $500 billion bet on the future of AI. She speaks with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman & Softbank CEO Masayoshi Son about their hopes for the project.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Emily goes inside Stargate, an historic $500 billion bet on the future of AI. She speaks with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman & Softbank CEO Masayoshi Son about their hopes for the project.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S4 - EP 4
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Reese Witherspoon and the Hello Sunshine executive team to discuss the company's founding mission and what's next for Hollywood.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S4 - EP 5
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Disney Entertainment Co-Chair Dana Walden and a cast of Disney stars for an inside look at the entertainment giant's global streaming and TV operations.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Four female climbers face the sporting challenge of a lifetime as they attempt to compete in the first ever Olympic climbing competition at Tokyo 2020.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Protect. How can we be optimistic in 2025? As Nikolaj Coster-Waldau begins season two, we're reminded of the delicate balance between human progress and protecting our planet.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Waste is a significant contributor to global warming, but turning it into a resource can help curb emissions and shrink humanity's environmental footprint.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: From transforming concrete into a carbon sink to mining nickel from genetically enhanced plants, we meet the bold inventors preserving and adapting to nature's offerings to help humanity thrive.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Meeting humanity's insatiable demand for energy while still curbing greenhouse emissions will require creative solutions both big and small.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it. In Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S5 - EP 5
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: This is the story of how an Arizona woman's house became a gateway for North Korea's IT operatives - an underground "laptop farm" that infiltrated US companies and pumped millions to the regime.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Rediscovering China
programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. With unrivalled access to the country's people and places, the program aims to show the global audience an inclusive and vigorous China._x000D__x000D_

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classics of the century are born again! Classic songs are reinterpreted by the best idol groups in Korea! Don't miss this beautiful competition with heart-moving moments that transcend generations!

programme.title: The Dropout Employee - EP 12
programme.desc: A company's flagship idol is seemingly "abandoned" by their own agency! Stepping away from life as a popular idol, the new journey begins.

programme.title: The Dropout Employee - EP 13
programme.desc: A company's flagship idol is seemingly "abandoned" by their own agency! Stepping away from life as a popular idol, the new journey begins.

programme.title: UNESCO World Heritage Special - EP 1
programme.desc: 1. The King's Residence, Changdeokgung 2. The Secret Garden of Changdeokgung 3. The Secret of the Volcanic Island 4. Forest of the Stone Buddha 5. Harmony of the Heaven and Earth, Hawking 6. The Underwater Palace, Daryeodo 7. Scholar's Waterway, Hahoe Folk Village 8. A Worship for the King, Gwangneung Forest

programme.title: My Neighbor, Charles - EP 522
programme.desc: Foreigners, leaving their homelands behind, have come all the way to a new country, South Korea, for reasons such as work, study or even marriage. The real stories of foreigners who challenge themselves to survive in Korean society are unfolded!

programme.title: Marie and Her Three Daddies - EP 120
programme.desc: Marie's turbulent journey to find her father leads to the birth of an eccentric new family - one that proves stronger than blood and more persistent than DNA.

programme.title: Pearl in Red - EP 22
programme.desc: In this intense revenge chronicle, two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Police University - EP 10
programme.desc: Police University is a romantic comedy about uniformed elite cadets chasing after their dreams.

programme.title: The Seasons - EP 17
programme.desc: When the end of one week meets the start of another week, this talk show will bring you music and stories that soothe your worries and concerns.

programme.title: Unkind Ladies - EP 19
programme.desc: Unkind Ladies follows three generations of strong-willed women in one household led by matriarch Kang Sunok, and the ups and downs in their careers, love lives and family relationships.

programme.title: No Return - EP 11
programme.desc: Shap-chat and Kwai-sim question Master Nine regarding some textile factory female worker. Master Nine tells them he is not involved in the textile factory operations. Mau-choi teams up with Master Nine and Kwai-sun to slander Kwai-sim. They also send a letter about Wai Ho’s past gangland activities to Fa-heung’s parents.

programme.title: No Return - EP 12
programme.desc: Kwai-sim is saddened as Mrs. Tang Sr. inexplicably commits suicide. Shap-chat senses Kwai-sim wants to hire some hitman to kill Mau-choi. Shap-chat rushes to the scene and tells the hitman their job is canceled. The hitmen syndicate boss threateningly points a gun at Shap-chat. Kwai-sim turns up just in time and saves Shap-chat.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 854
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 18
programme.desc: The all-conquering snooker player YAU YAT KIU (Cheng Siu Chau, Adam) takes everyone by surprise when he suddenly retires from the snooker world. This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 8
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Unchained Medley - EP 13
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 24
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 6
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. His uncle Kwai (Lau Kar Fai) is on his side and finally Tak is given a chance to learn in a Chinese restaurant in a hotel. There he meets his dream girl Wing (Kennix Kwok) and wins her heart. Tak’s best friend Lam (Fennie Yuen) is upset when she learns about this.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 7

programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 19
programme.desc: The all-conquering snooker player YAU YAT KIU (Cheng Siu Chau, Adam) takes everyone by surprise when he suddenly retires from the snooker world. This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 9
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Unchained Medley - EP 14
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 25
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 8
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. His uncle Kwai (Lau Kar Fai) is on his side and finally Tak is given a chance to learn in a Chinese restaurant in a hotel. There he meets his dream girl Wing (Kennix Kwok) and wins her heart. Tak’s best friend Lam (Fennie Yuen) is upset when she learns about this.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 9
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. His uncle Kwai (Lau Kar Fai) is on his side and finally Tak is given a chance to learn in a Chinese restaurant in a hotel. There he meets his dream girl Wing (Kennix Kwok) and wins her heart.
